metadata.item: Bhagalpuri silk kurta with Madhubani hand-painted yoke

A breathable, lightweight linen dress in a soft sage green, designed for the humid Kerala summers, featuring subtle wooden buttons.
A relaxed-fit shirt and trouser co-ord set in a breezy breathable fabric, styled for comfort during the energetic Kochi boat-race season.

metadata.item: Kasavu Saree with Mural Art border
metadata.description: Authentic off-white cotton Kasavu saree featuring hand-painted Kerala mural art on the pallu and traditional gold zari borders.

metadata.description: Breathable light blue linen kurta paired with a contemporary white cotton mundu, perfect for humid Kochi summers and boat-race events.
